## 🧪 Verification Checklist

- [ ] Ran `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` with **0 TypeScript errors**
- [ ] Built MCP server binary (`npm run build:mcp`)
- [ ] Verified local benchmark suite execution (`python3 tests/benchmarks/run_benchmarks.py`)
- [ ] Tested on Apple Silicon Metal GPU hardware
- [ ] Added or updated relevant documentation in `docs/` or `README.md`
